title: Of Steadfast Love and Justice, LORD

verses.text: Within my home the life I lead will show a blameless heart. My eyes will view no worthless thing; from them I will depart. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018
I hate what faithless people do; it shall not cling to me. All wicked people I’ll avoid; from evil I’ll stay free. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018 Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018
I see the faithful in the land, and they shall dwell with me; yea, he who walks in blameless ways shall minister to me.
No one who practices deceit Will dwell within my home; Nor will the one whose words are false Before me ever come. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018
